Review Text: Discover Weekly is stale — same artists every week. I want genuinely new music not my top 50 again.
Spotify recommendations feel stuck. Release Radar and Daily Mix play songs I already saved months ago.
Love the app but the algorithm keeps pushing mainstream pop when I listen to jazz and ambient.
Made For You playlists recycle the same tracks. Hard to discover underground artists on Spotify.
Search for new music is terrible compared to finding songs on TikTok. Spotify feels behind on discovery.
Discover Weekly used to be amazing. Now it feels like a shuffle of my liked songs with one new track.
Radio feature repeats the same 20 songs. I wish recommendations considered mood and time of day.
Great library management but discovery is weak. Blend playlists helped me find friends music though.
Algorithm thinks I only want one genre. I listen to hip hop AND classical but never get classical recs.
Daily Mix 1 is literally the same playlist every day with tiny changes. Disappointing for premium user.
Spotify is unbeatable for playlists but I discover most new artists on YouTube or Instagram reels.
Recommendations ignore my skips. I skip the same artist 10 times and they still appear in Discover Weekly.
Song radio always loops back to hits from 2018. Need better deep-cut discovery for niche genres.
Fresh Finds was good before they removed it. Now I rely on follower playlists which is manual work.
Smart Shuffle is confusing — sometimes it plays only familiar songs when I wanted discovery mode.
The home feed feels like ads and podcasts. Hard to find a simple path to explore new genres.
Spotify Wrapped is fun but I want year-round stats on how much of my listening is repeat vs new.
Discover Weekly picks feel safe and corporate. Missing the serendipity I got from old Spotify.
Same songs in every algorithm playlist. My wife and I get nearly identical Discover Weekly lists.
Best music app overall. Discovery could improve by surfacing local artists in my city.
Autoplay after albums plays unrelated popular tracks instead of similar underground artists.
I use Spotify for podcasts only now. Music discovery moved to Bandcamp and SoundCloud.
Release Radar misses small indie releases I follow on social media. Only shows big label artists.
Playlist recommendations on home screen are repetitive. Show me genres I never explore.
DJ feature is gimmicky. Would prefer better filters on Discover like decade, region, or mood.
Algorithm punishes exploring new genres — my recommendations narrow after one week of jazz.
Search autocomplete prioritizes popular songs. Hard to discover remixes and live versions.
Discover Weekly has maybe 2 songs I keep. Rest are skips. Apple Music discovery feels fresher.
Same top artists in every Made For You tile. Feels like Spotify ran out of ideas for my taste.
Love collaborative playlists for discovery with friends. Algorithm solo discovery is mid though.
Radio from song always adds the same featured artists Spotify promotes globally.
I want a discovery mode that only plays songs I have never heard, zero repeats for 30 days.
Blend helped discovery but needs more controls. Also suggest artists similar to my recent likes.
Home page algorithm pushes podcast recs I never asked for. Buried the music discovery tiles.
Time Capsule and On Repeat are fun but not discovery — where is the new artist spotlight?
Discover Weekly same songs as last month. Checked with friends — we all get parallel universes of sameness.
Premium user frustrated that recommendations feel like free tier with ads removed only.
Song Radio could use diversity slider — sometimes I want comfort, sometimes pure exploration.
Algorithm ignores my playlist folders. I have a discovery playlist but recs dont learn from it.
New releases section is useful but Discover Weekly doesnt align with artists I actually follow.
Still my daily driver. Would pay extra tier for human-curated discovery like old Discover tab.
Repeat listening trap — Spotify keeps me in a loop of favorites instead of expanding taste.
Search by mood or activity for discovery is clunky. Playlists feel generic and over-curated.
Recommendations improved after I reset taste profile manually by un-liking hundreds of songs.
Discover Weekly algorithm playlist is broken for metal listeners. Keeps suggesting pop punk.
Same songs problem is real — hear identical tracks on Daily Mix, Release Radar, and Discover.
Want discovery based on lyrics themes not just audio similarity. Current recs feel shallow.
Spotify should explain WHY a song was recommended. Transparency would help trust the algorithm.
Friend activity feed disappeared. Social discovery was underrated for finding new music.
Made For You section never surfaces international artists despite me listening to K-pop sometimes.
Playlist generator from prompt is cool but results feel like top charts not deep discovery.
I replay the same 10 songs because recommendations dont push me out of comfort zone enough.
Excellent app design. Discovery gap is the only reason I still check other streaming services.
Algorithm fatigue — after 5 years premium I feel Spotify knows me too well and stopped surprising me.
Discover tab should separate rediscover favorites vs brand new artists more clearly.
Weekly discovery email would help. I forget to open Made For You and miss good recommendations.
